name: Roasted Red and Green Pepper Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cut the red and green bell peppers into bite-sized pieces.
3. Place the chopped peppers in a bowl and mix with mayonnaise and crushed dried parsley until combined.
4. Stir in sour cream until well blended.
5. Transfer mixture to a serving dish.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving to allow flavors to develop.
7. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
